---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for zWork
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What is the user trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it?

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or anything else that helps explain the request.
